spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.description: A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature within range. On a hit, it takes 1d8 cold damage, and its speed is reduced by 10 feet.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.description: Lightning springs from your hand to deliver a shock to a creature you try to touch. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 lightning damage, and it can't take reactions.

spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.description: You hurl a bubble of acid. Choose one or two creatures within 5 feet of each other. A target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 acid damage.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.description: You create a ghostly, skeletal hand in the space of a creature within range. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 necrotic damage, and it can't regain hit points until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.description: You extend your hand toward a creature you can see within range and project a puff of noxious gas from your palm. The creature must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d12 poison damage.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.description: A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration or until you dismiss it as an action.

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.description: You create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for the duration.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.description: This spell is a minor magical trick that novice spellcasters use for practice.

spells.name: Light
spells.description: You touch one object that is no larger than 10 feet in any dimension. Until the spell ends, the object sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

spells.name: Message
components: M (a short piece of copper wire)
spells.description: You point your finger toward a creature within range and whisper a message. The target (and only the target) hears the message and can reply in a whisper that only you can hear.

spells.name: True Strike
spells.description: You extend your hand and point a finger at a target in range. On your next turn, you gain advantage on your first attack roll against the target.
